adventures.name: Cappadocia
adventures.description: Cappadocia is a historical region in Central Anatolia region, Turkey.

adventures.name: Santorini
adventures.description: Santorini is a Greek island in the southern Aegean Sea, about 200 km (120 mi) southeast from the mainland.

adventures.name: Easter Island
adventures.description: Easter Island is an island and special territory of Chile in the southeastern Pacific Ocean.

adventures.name: Cairo
adventures.description: Cairo is the capital and largest city of Egypt and the Cairo Governorate. It is home to more than 9.8 million people.

adventures.name: Seville
adventures.description: Seville is the capital and largest city of the Spanish autonomous community of Andalusia and the province of Seville.
